title: A Paramnesis MC
description: Modpack for the hololive fangame A Paramnesis Novella server.
body:
![A Paramnesis Minecraft Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc1a17011144dfdc852cf53a0701f877eeaf0c9f.png)


## FEATURES
 
👁‍🗨 Fabric only!

👁‍🗨 Built in shader support

👁‍🗨 Enhanced world and structure generation

👁‍🗨 Tons of new mobs

👁‍🗨 Backpacks for your future adventures

👁‍🗨 Furniture for all your decoration needs

👁‍🗨 Vertical slabs

👁‍🗨 Worldwide seasons

👁‍🗨 In-Game voice chat with environmental interactions

👁‍🗨 Tons of QoL Mods [Quality of Life]



## Modlist
